### Props

| Name               | Type      | Required | Default                                                                     | Description                                                          |
| ------------------ | --------- | -------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `integrationId`    | `string`  | ✓        | —                                                                           | Stable integration id (matches PHP-side provider id).                |
| `objectId`         | `string`  | ✓        | —                                                                           | Parent object id.                                                    |
| `register`         | `string`  |          | `''`                                                                        | OpenRegister register id (slug or uuid).                             |
| `schema`           | `string`  |          | `''`                                                                        | OpenRegister schema id (slug or uuid).                               |
| `apiBase`          | `string`  |          | `'/apps/openregister/api'`                                                  | Base API URL.                                                        |
| `allowUnlink`      | `boolean` |          | `true`                                                                      | Whether the unlink button is shown per row.                          |
| `emptyLabel`       | `string`  |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'Nothing linked yet')`                         | Pre-translated empty-state label.                                    |
| `unlinkLabel`      | `string`  |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'Unlink')`                                     | Pre-translated aria-label for the unlink button.                     |
| `unavailableLabel` | `string`  |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'This integration is currently unavailable.')` | Pre-translated banner when the underlying app/source is unavailable. |

### Events

| Name       | Payload | Description                                             |
| ---------- | ------- | ------------------------------------------------------- |
| `unlinked` | —       | Emitted after a row is unlinked. Payload: the row's id. |
